current_pain_point: Team leads often need to manually scan open tickets to understand which cases may need attention first.
automation_idea: Score open tickets by SLA risk and highlight cases that need review before they become urgent.
workflow_stage: Data import -> risk scoring -> priority flag -> dashboard update

current_pain_point: Swap requests can take time to validate because staffing coverage, overlap, and rule checks are reviewed manually.
automation_idea: Use a rule-based workflow to validate common conflicts and route only exceptions for manual review.
workflow_stage: Request received -> rule check -> approval status -> tracker update

current_pain_point: Different internal requests can arrive through separate channels, making ownership and follow-up unclear.
automation_idea: Classify requests by type and route them to the correct owner with a visible status tracker.
workflow_stage: Form entry -> category check -> owner routing -> status notification

current_pain_point: Monthly reports can require repeated manual checks before leadership has a clear view of cost movement.
automation_idea: Prepare a structured monthly summary that highlights cost movement, outliers, and pending follow-ups.
workflow_stage: Source data -> scheduled calculation -> exception check -> report summary

current_pain_point: Incident updates can be inconsistent when work moves between shifts or locations.
automation_idea: Create a structured handover summary with incident context, current status, and next recommended action.
workflow_stage: Incident note -> summary template -> risk flag -> handover message

current_pain_point: Automation ideas are discussed, but they are not always captured, scored, and tracked in one place.
automation_idea: Create a simple intake and scoring process so ideas can be compared by value and readiness.
workflow_stage: Idea submitted -> scoring -> roadmap status -> monthly review

current_pain_point: Recurring issues may be visible to agents before they are visible in leadership reporting.
automation_idea: Group similar issue types and show early signals when one topic starts increasing.
workflow_stage: Ticket category import -> trend check -> repeat issue flag -> review note
